title: Crowdfunding Campaign Agreement
description: A promotional services agreement for managing and launching reward-based or equity crowdfunding campaigns.
whatsCovered: Scope of campaign launch and promotional design services
Campaign timeline, launch date, and goal requirements
Service fee, retainer, and commission percentage splits
Ownership of campaign video assets and email lists
whenToUse: Use this agreement when hiring an agency, advisor, or marketing firm to run a Kickstarter, Indiegogo, or Wefunder campaign.

fields.label: Company Office Address
fields.placeholder: e.g. 100 Innovators Blvd, San Francisco, CA

clauses.heading: CROWDFUNDING CAMPAIGN AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This startup agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {company_name}, located at {company_address} (the "Company"), and the counterparty or stakeholders executing this document below.

clauses.heading: 1. Core Agreement Terms
clauses.body: This agreement sets out the transaction and operational terms for Crowdfunding Campaign Agreement. The parties agree to coordinate in good faith to complete milestones, share resources, or grant rights as specified.

clauses.heading: 2. Agency Fees and Commissions
clauses.body: Startup Client shall pay Agency a retainer of {retainer_fee} per month, plus a success commission fee of {commission_rate}% of the total funds raised on {campaign_platform}.

clauses.heading: 3. Proprietary Information and Secrecy
clauses.body: Both parties agree to treat all financial metrics, corporate plans, cap tables, and research files received during the execution of this Agreement as confidential and proprietary.

clauses.heading: 4. Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Are platform fees included in the agency commission?
faq.answer: No, standard platforms (Kickstarter, Wefunder) deduct their fees (usually 5%) separately from any agency commissions.

faq.question: Who owns the email list collected during the campaign?
faq.answer: This template ensures the startup owns the subscriber list and backer database post-campaign.
